commit.message:
Fix recovery path: don't short-circuit when metadata is missing

When power dies between finalize_output and save_metadata, the old
recovery path cleaned up the checkpoint and returned True (skip).
But the dispatcher requires BOTH CSV + metadata to exist. Result:
dispatcher re-queued → next run archived the good CSV → full re-run.

Fix: return False (proceed) without cleaning up intermediates.
The normal flow resumes with all draws already in checkpoint,
for-loop skips everything, finalize harmlessly re-writes CSV,
and save_metadata finally writes the missing sidecar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: invoke Properties via ShellExecuteEx instead of IContextMenu::InvokeCommand

The built-in Properties handler fails with "The properties for this item
are not available" when called via a numeric MAKEINTRESOURCE verb from a
non-Explorer process — it cannot resolve the file PIDL path in that context.

Fix: use IContextMenu::GetCommandString(GCS_VERBW) to detect when the user
chose the "properties" verb, then bypass InvokeCommand and call ShellExecuteEx
with lpVerb="properties", lpFile=<path>, and SEE_MASK_INVOKEIDLIST instead.
SEE_MASK_INVOKEIDLIST tells the shell to go through its own PIDL mechanism,
which correctly opens the Properties sheet regardless of the calling process.
All other verbs continue to use InvokeCommand as before.

commit.message:
feat: add caller-scoped actor override and thread-safe timer operations

Adds explicit actor parameter to MCP timer/workflow tools so callers can
override the transport default. Wraps multi-step write operations in a
serialized lock to prevent interleaved SQLite writes from concurrent MCP
calls. Enables WAL mode for concurrent read/write support. Adds retry-safe
actual_time propagation in complete_node/submit_for_review.

docs: Replace template-based reports with JSONata Query Engine (#20)

* docs: Replace template-based reports with JSONata Query Engine (#20)

Redesign the reports/toc layer based on MS-Access analogy
(Table=source, Query=queries, Form/Report=templates).
Replace template engine data transformation with JSONata query
language to eliminate data→text→data roundtrip, YAML escape
issues, and type degradation. Place Query Engine in Validator APP.
Reorganize project directories into model/presentation/output.
Add Phase 0 (JSONata PoC) to Python roadmap.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Drizzle array parameter passing — replace ANY(::text[]) with IN + sqlInList

Drizzle's sql template passes JS arrays as single string params, not
Postgres array literals. Replaced all ANY(${arr}::text[]) and ::int[]
patterns with either inArray() for Drizzle model queries or
IN (${sqlInList(arr)}) for raw neon_auth SQL queries.

Added sqlInList() helper to lib/db.ts that creates properly parameterized
IN ($1, $2, ...) lists via sql.join().

fix: restore hard-coded thread pool size limit of 16 (#48128)

## Summary
- Restore the hard-coded maximum of 16 threads for the C++ IO thread
pool
- In large file scenarios, CGo threads can consume all available thread
resources, starving Go goroutines
- This reverts commit ffd3435c4f and the related test changes from
a41d170c14

issue: https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/issues/48060

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify thread pool size is clamped to 16 via C++ unit test
(`ThreadPoolTest.ResizeAboveMaximum`)
- [ ] Test large file load scenarios to confirm Go goroutines are no
longer starved

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Signed-off-by: sijie-ni-0214 <sijie.ni@zilliz.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: revert to GetUIObjectOf + add IContextMenu2/3 owner-draw message forwarding

Two fixes in one:

1. Revert from SHCreateDefaultContextMenu back to IShellFolder::GetUIObjectOf.
   SHCreateDefaultContextMenu introduced the "properties not available" error
   because its pidlFolder + psf combination was inconsistent, causing the
   built-in Properties handler to fail to resolve the item path.

2. Add IContextMenu2 / IContextMenu3 support with a custom WndProc.
   Many shell extensions (7-Zip's submenu icon, others) use owner-drawn menu
   items via WM_INITMENUPOPUP / WM_DRAWITEM / WM_MEASUREITEM. Without
   forwarding these messages to IContextMenu2::HandleMenuMsg the items are
   inserted into the HMENU but render as blank/invisible entries. The custom
   WndProc now forwards all four relevant messages; IContextMenu3 is preferred
   when available (adds HandleMenuMsg2 for WM_MENUCHAR support).

   [ThreadStatic] fields share the current IContextMenu2/3 pointers with the
   static WndProc delegate safely — both always execute on the same STA thread.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

revert: remove regime switching, restore v4 time-weighted training

10y walk-forward 驗證（508 再平衡期）顯示 regime switching 長期有害：
- sideways (35%) topN×75% 縮減造成超額 -0.21%/期持續損耗
- bear heuristic 評分 10y 整體表現劣於模型（超額 -0.76%/期）
- 10y with regime switching: 超額 +3.18%，MDD -93.53%，Sharpe -0.33

移除 regime switching 後 10y 結果：
- 累積 -84.96%，大盤 -85.35%，超額 +0.38%
- MDD -87.74%，Sharpe -0.36，勝率 39.56%，停損 1082 次

Changes:
- skills/backtest.py: 移除 regime_switching 參數及相關邏輯，還原原始 market filter
- skills/daily_pick.py: 移除 regime 切換與 bear heuristic 評分區塊
- skills/market_regime.py: 加 # NOT IN USE 頭三行（保留供未來研究）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: run_bootstrap_evaluation returns bool, not None on skip

When _check_existing_and_handle finds matching output and skips,
the bare `return` yielded None. main() then did sys.exit(0 if None else 1)
→ exit code 1 → dispatcher re-queued completed jobs in an infinite loop.

Fix: return True on skip, change annotation -> bool.

commit.message:
fix: use SHGetIDListFromObject to get pidlFolder instead of re-parsing the path

Re-parsing the parent directory via SHParseDisplayName can produce a
PIDL that differs subtly from what psfRaw actually represents (different
case, junction/symlink resolution, etc.). DEFCONTEXTMENU.pidlFolder +
pidlChild are combined by the Properties handler to resolve the file path;
a mismatch causes "The properties for this item are not available".

Fix: call SHGetIDListFromObject(psfRaw) to obtain the folder's own
canonical PIDL — guaranteed to be consistent with the IShellFolder we
already have, so Properties and other verbs can resolve the item path.

Fix WSL2 session path mismatch for --continue and session history

Electron runs as a Windows process but Claude Code runs inside WSL2,
causing session lookups to use wrong home dir and path encoding.
Added helpers to resolve WSL home via UNC path and encode CWD as
WSL-style path. Fixes --continue not finding sessions and potentially
session history showing incomplete results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(ph5): Phase 5 — OS通知・GitHubポーリング・CI監視・自動polling起動

R-L01: GitHub Notifications API ポーリング
- github.rs に list_github_notifications() / get_check_runs() を追加
- poller::sync_project にて GET /notifications?participating=true を定期取得
- reason/subject_type から event_type (pr_comment, issue_assigned, pr_opened) を判定
- DB に notification を INSERT して notification_new イベントを emit

R-L02: CI check-runs 監視
- open PR のヘッドコミット SHA に対して check-runs を取得
- completed かつ conclusion が変化したとき ci_pass/ci_fail 通知を作成
- pull_requests.checks_status を DB 更新

polling_active フラグ連携
- poller::start ループ内で AppState.polling_active を確認してスキップ

F-P02:
- notification_push コマンドで OS 通知も発火 (tauri-plugin-notification)
- projectStore.selectProject でポーリングを自動起動 (ipc.pollingStart)

F-Q02:
- SettingsScreen に「OS 通知」セクション追加（許可状態表示 + ALLOW NOTIFICATIONS ボタン）

Tests: 586 TS (✓), 228 Rust (✓)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
